input:
PRD draft:

# Project Foobar

## Problem
Users want better AI experiences.

## Solution
We will build an AI feature that helps users get better outcomes by leveraging machine learning to personalize their experience.

## Success metrics
We expect this to drive engagement.

Launch plan:

Success criteria: 10,000 signups in the first month and 1M pageviews on the marketing page.

Launch readiness review:

- Eval coverage: complete (we tested 12 prompts)
- Latency: good (under 2s usually)
- Reliability: solid (works for our internal team)
- Cost: acceptable

Ready to ship.

PRD draft:

# Cold-start retention experiment

## Problem
38% of users who sign up never come back after day 1. Top reason from exit surveys (n=240): they couldn't find the value in 60 seconds.

## Solution
Replace the empty home dashboard with three pre-populated example projects the user can click into immediately. The examples are templated from the top-10 onboarding flows from our power-user cohort.

## Success metric
D7 retention for new signups. Baseline 42%. Target 50%. We'll roll back if D7 drops below 40% on the treatment arm in the first 2 weeks.

## Risks
The examples might confuse advanced users who want a blank canvas. Mitigation: dismiss-all link in the header, sticky preference.

PRD draft:

# AI Summarization

## Problem
Users spend too much time reading meeting notes.

## Solution
We will summarize meeting notes with Claude. Summary will appear at the top of the meeting page.

## Success
Reduce time-to-read by 50%.

Launch readiness:

We are excited to launch the new AI tier next week. The team has worked hard. We expect strong adoption and great feedback from customers.

PRD draft:

# Foobar v2 launch

## Features
- AI-powered search
- Real-time collaboration
- Mobile app redesign
- New onboarding flow
- Performance improvements
- Bug fixes from Q2
- API rate limit increases
- Updated billing portal

## Why now
Our customers have been asking for these.

Launch plan:

We will ship the new chat feature on Tuesday. Success metric: D7 retention up 5 points. We will measure weekly and present results to the leadership team at end of quarter.

Q4 plan:

We believe AI will transform how our customers work. We expect strong adoption of the new tier. We are confident this is the right bet.

Pre-launch checklist:

- Performance: good (in our testing)
- Reliability: solid (our team is happy)
- Eval coverage: comprehensive
- Documentation: done

Ready to ship.
